summary: A single-story rectangular-ish building with a large curved/gabled dark red roof and three tall corner towers with overhanging flat canopies. Walls are layered horizontal bands with vertical stone corner pillars and stone trim at mid-height and roofline. A low stone block kerb outlines a surrounding yard.

shape.overall_form: main rectangular mass with an asymmetrical curved/gabled roof and three separate tall narrow towers at corners connected to the main mass
shape.symmetry: approximate bilateral along long axis but asymmetrical due to tower placement

materials.name: wood
materials.role: primary_wall_panels (plank-like horizontal bands and tower faces)

materials.name: stonebrick
materials.role: foundation/kerb and small decorative blocks around perimeter and base

materials.name: slab_stone
materials.role: roof/edge trim for tower canopies and roof edging

materials.name: brick
materials.role: main roof (dark red/burgundy blocks, appears like nether_brick or red brick equivalent) - normalized to brick

materials.name: fence
materials.role: not observed as prominent; possible small vertical details (uncertain)

elements: large curved/gabled dark red roof with stepped edges and stone slab edging
three tall vertical towers (two front, one rear/side) with overhanging flat canopies edged in stone slab and glow block center
horizontal wall bands: lower and upper wood bands separated by stone trim and stone pillars at corners
small square windows in towers and along walls
stone block kerb/low posts forming a rectangular yard border
rebuild_hints: Construct a rectangular main hall base ~21x17 blocks with walls of horizontal wood planks divided by a mid-height stone trim and vertical stone corner pillars.
Create a stepped dark-red gabled roof spanning the long axis with 1-block-high stepped rows, add stone slab edging along the ridge and stepped edges.
Place three tall 3-4 block wide towers rising above the roof at corner positions; top each tower with a 1-2 block thick overhanging canopy: dark red top with stone slab rim and a central glow block.
Add evenly spaced small square windows (2x2) on tower faces and small windows along the wall bands; add a low perimeter of stonebrick blocks one block from the main walls to form the yard kerb.
uncertainties: Exact block types for the dark red roof appear like nether_brick stairs/blocks; normalized to 'brick' but could be nether_brick (uncertain).
Ground material around the building (reddish soil) is visible but specific block type is unclear (could be coarse dirt or terracotta).
Interior layout, entrances and door locations are not visible in provided views.
Exact tower foundation width/depth and precise spacing of the perimeter stone kerb are estimated from visuals and may vary by ±2 blocks.
